200# return «

User rating: item not rated yet

Fighter type: Mage

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

Once in a while, summons a prismatic ray from above that strikes a random enemy, dealing 30000 pure damage to the main target, ignoring armor and shields, and 25% damage to nearby enemies.

description 4/6

Once in a while, summons a prismatic ray from above that hits a random enemy and deals 60000 pure damage to it, ignoring armor and shields. Nearby enemies take 40% of the damage done by the ray. Emits two rays at once.

description 6/6

Once in a while, summons a prismatic ray from above that hits a random enemy and deals 100000 pure damage to it, ignoring armor and shields. Nearby enemies take 50% of the damage done by the ray. Emits three rays at once. The rays ignore the enemies’ immunities.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

The Oracle’s ray deals the same amount of damage to all affected targets.

description 4/6

The Oracle’s ray deals the same amount of damage to all affected targets. The Oracle’s rays deals additional magic damage equal to 50% of the Oracle’s spell power to all affected targets.

description 6/6

The Oracle’s ray deals the same amount of damage to all affected targets. The Oracle’s rays deals additional magic damage equal to 50% of the Oracle’s spell power to all affected targets. The Oracle summons an extra beam.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

The Oracle’s ray reduces enemy mage’s damage by 25% and blinds all affected enemies for 6 sec. Blinded units have a 30% chance to miss their target.

description 4/6

The Oracle’s ray reduces enemy mage’s damage by 25% and blinds all affected enemies for 6 sec. Blinded units have a 30% chance to miss their target. Once in a while, the Oracle casts a shield that absorbs 20% damage of any type for 5 sec.

description 6/6

The Oracle’s ray reduces enemy mage’s damage by 25% and blinds all affected enemies for 6 sec. Blinded units have a 30% chance to miss their target. Once in a while, the Oracle casts a shield that absorbs 20% damage of any type for 5 sec. Enemies hit by the Oracle’s rays cannot use the weapon’s ability for 5 sec. Cooldown time of their weapon’s ability is increased by 5 sec.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

The Oracle’s ray disarm all affected enemies for 2 sec. The disarmed enemy is unable to use their weapon abilities during that period.

description 4/6

The Oracle's ray disarm all affected enemies for 2 sec. The disarmed enemy is unable to use their weapon abilities during that period. The Oracle’s spell power is increased by 25% for 5 sec for each enemy hit by a ray.

description 6/6

The Oracle's ray disarm all affected enemies for 2 sec. The disarmed enemy is unable to use their weapon abilities during that period. The Oracle’s spell power is increased by 25% for 5 sec for each enemy hit by a ray. The Oracle’s rays silence the artifacts' abilities of affected units for 3 sec. They cannot use artifacts’ abilities during this time. When the silence wears off, the cooldown time of the artifacts' abilities of these units is increased by 3 sec.

Materials

Cosmic Elixir
Philosopher Stone

Dungeon chest

purchase in:
